text: Near-term catalysts include Q2 2025 earnings reporting, part of a critical earnings period for Big Tech companies collectively representing approximately $11.3 trillion in market value [CHUNK_ID: 95e75447-3c30-49f6-861e-b4c471cfa261]. Analyst actions have been supportive, with UBS recently lifting its price target on Amazon stock, signaling strength [CHUNK_ID: 758f8efe-00fb-498c-93e6-263f42d2d0d9]. However, we note that FY2025 figures represent projections rather than realized results, and actual performance may vary based on Q2 2025 outcomes and broader macroeconomic conditions. Our Positive stance reflects confidence in Amazon's diversified business model and profitability trajectory, but investors should monitor upcoming earnings results and regulatory developments closely.
